## Checklist

- [ ] ./gradlew build passes (compiles + tests)
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (tests-only is fine)
- [ ] Exit-code contract (0/1/2/3) preserved
- [ ] JSON contract unchanged, or schemaVersion bumped
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated docs / CHANGELOG.md if user-facing
